backend.changelog: Manifest schema v2 — sha256 field added per artifact. No functional changes to runtime; parser groundwork for Phase 2 auto-apply.

cadBridge.changelog: Fix Setup.bat dying with 'Setup.ps1 was unexpected at this time' when the install path contains parentheses (e.g. when a browser auto-renames a second download to CadBridge-Setup (1)). The multi-line if-not-exist blocks were re-written as goto-style branches, which sidestep CMD's parens-in-path / parens-in-block parser confusion entirely. Also rolls forward 1.8.23 SW/CATIA running-process warning, 1.8.22 tray menu auto-refresh fix, and 1.8.21 Rollback feature.
